task_completion.description: Log in to the system using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the login screen with username 'admin' and password entered, or the system dashboard indicating the user is logged in as an administrator.
A search bar or patient lookup tool contains the text 'Robert' and/or 'Miller', or a filtered patient list showing this patient.

task_completion.description: Open the medical record for 'Robert Miller'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main patient dashboard or chart is open, with the name 'Robert Miller' clearly visible in the patient header or title.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the demographics edit screen or the patient notes/annotations section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI shows an active form for editing patient demographics, or a section specifically designated for adding administrative notes or annotations.

task_completion.description: Flag the patient as deceased with the date '2026-03-08' OR add the required administrative note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'deceased' status checkbox/dropdown is selected with the date '2026-03-08' entered in the corresponding field, OR the exact text 'PATIENT DECEASED - 2026-03-08' is typed into a note/annotation text area.
The cursor clicking a 'Save' or 'Add Note' button, a success message (e.g., 'Record saved successfully'), or the updated deceased status/note visible in the read-only view of the patient's chart.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the medical record system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or desktop application GUI being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to update the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, terminal windows, or database management tools are visible executing UPDATE or INSERT commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual medical record software rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard medical record system elements (menus, patient headers, forms) and is not a plain text editor like Notepad or Nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Robert Miller. Required Date of Death: 2026-03-08. Required Note Text (if demographics unavailable): PATIENT DECEASED - 2026-03-08.
